title: Build connected AI: Orchestrate tools and agents with registries and ADK
summary: Google Cloud Tech presents the Agent Development Kit (ADK) with Agent Registry for orchestrating tools and agents across organizational systems. The session covers discovering and integrating MCP servers, building custom MCP servers, and connecting agents to third-party SaaS and on-premises data sources.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through the Agent Development Kit (ADK) paired with Agent Registry for orchestrating tools and agents across organizational systems. The session covers discovering and integrating existing Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, building custom MCP servers, and connecting agents to third-party SaaS platforms and on-premises data sources. The throughline is registry-based coordination of multi-agent systems, with MCP as the layer for tool and data integration.
